name: Google Maps Business Lead Scraper
description: Searches for businesses via Exa, scrapes their websites with Firecrawl for contact details, uses Claude AI to extract and structure lead data (name, email, phone, address), and saves the leads to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Scrape business leads from Google Maps using OpenAI and Google Sheets

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for business search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping business websites

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving leads

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for completion notification

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for lead generation updates

businessType.description: Type of business to search for (e.g. 'plumbers', 'restaurants', 'dentists')

location.description: Location to search in (e.g. 'San Francisco, CA', 'New York City')

sheetTitle.description: Title for the Google Sheets spreadsheet

steps.name: Extract business URLs from search results
Compile all business data for extraction
Build Claude prompt for lead extraction
Post lead generation results to Slack
